subcodes.first_line: From this Most Exalted Station We send forth Our glorification upon the faces of those who have turned and attained unto the purest wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نکبر من هذا المقام الاعلی علی وجوه الذین اقبلوا و فازوا بالرحیق الاصفی
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
